tasks.title: Analyze current documentation file names in docs folder
tasks.description: List and analyze all existing file names in the docs/ folder to identify inconsistencies in naming format such as casing, separators, and extensions
acceptanceCriteria: Complete list of docs/ folder file names is generated
Inconsistencies in naming format are identified and documented
tasks.expectedResult: A documented list of all docs/ file names with noted inconsistencies in naming format

outputPlan.description: Text file listing all docs/ filenames and identified inconsistencies

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides baseline data on current docs file naming to guide refactoring

tasks.title: Define consistent naming format for docs files
tasks.description: Establish a clear naming convention for documentation files in docs/ folder, including casing (e.g., kebab-case), separator characters, and file extensions, aligned with project conventions
acceptanceCriteria: Naming convention document is created and approved
Convention aligns with existing project naming rules
tasks.expectedResult: A documented naming convention guideline for docs/ folder files

outputPlan.description: Markdown file specifying the naming format rules for docs files

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear standard to apply for renaming docs files

tasks.title: Rename docs files to conform to naming convention
tasks.description: Rename all files in the docs/ folder to follow the established naming convention, updating file names to consistent casing and separators without changing file extensions
acceptanceCriteria: All docs files renamed according to naming convention
Git status shows only intended renames
tasks.expectedResult: All documentation files in docs/ have consistent, standardized file names

outputPlan.description: Renamed documentation files in docs/ folder

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures all docs files have consistent naming for easier maintenance and clarity

tasks.title: Update internal references to renamed docs files
tasks.description: Search and update all internal references in the codebase and documentation that point to the renamed docs files to use the new consistent file names
acceptanceCriteria: All references to docs files updated to new names
No broken links or import errors related to docs files
tasks.expectedResult: Codebase and documentation references to docs files are consistent with new file names

outputPlan.description: Updated references inside README.md if any

evidence: No import errors referencing docs files
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Maintains integrity of documentation and code references after renaming

tasks.title: Run lint, typecheck, and tests to validate renaming changes
tasks.description: Execute linting, type checking, and test suites to ensure that renaming docs files and updating references did not introduce errors or warnings
acceptanceCriteria: Type checking passes with no errors
tasks.expectedResult: Codebase is clean and all tests pass after docs file renaming and reference updates

metadata.inputContext: All previous renaming and reference update tasks
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Confirms that renaming and reference updates are safe and stable
